content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape — Nifty -0.39%, Bank Nifty -1.20%, PSU Bank -2.61% weighing, but IT +1.44% and individual earnings winners (COFORGE +17%, SRF +10.6%, POLYCAB +9%, PIDILITIND +8.7%, BHARATFORG +6.2%, BAJAJ-AUTO +6.7%) are driving the book. India VIX +1.68% to 16.9 reflects elevated geopolitical premium (Iran-US). Book is +1.36% today on broad earnings tailwinds; priority is locking in gains via SL trails on the 5+ winners since 45 min remain to close.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent — SL 1068.30 already tightened to 7.7% above entry 984, locking in ~8.6% gain. CMP 1091.50, gap to SL ~2.1% — within normal volatility band, no further tightening needed (would be sub-1% gap = forced exit). Stored SL = proposed SL = no-op, switching to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -0.7%, well above SL 121. Risk-off hedge thesis intact (VIX +1.68%, geopolitical premium). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.32% to 834, hit ATH 836.50 today. Q4 PAT +18%, copra deflation tailwind. Trail SL from 820 (entry-flat) to 825 = +0.6% above entry, locking small profit. Gap to CMP 833.50 = 1.0% (at trail-floor minimum). R:R: from 825 SL to 855 target = 30 reward vs 8.5 risk = solid."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +16.89% on Q4 beat. Stored SL 1341.52 already locks +6.6%. CMP 1368, gap to SL ~1.9% (just above 1% floor — appropriate, do not tighten further). Stored SL = proposed = effective HOLD, will move to position_actions HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "GRSE +4.53% but faded from intraday high 3129. SL 3000 below entry 3025, gap to CMP 3048 = 1.6%. Defense thesis intact, Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1 catalyst pending. Hold; not yet at +2% trigger to trail to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CAMS +5.09% on 7.4x volume, near 52w high 875. SL 825 already +2.4% above entry 806, locks ~2.4% gain. CMP 838, gap to SL = 1.6% (above 1% floor). No-op MODIFY — will switch to HOLD position_action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -0.5%, intraday faded from high 1515 to 1483. SL 1465 = -1.7% below entry 1490, within risk budget. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps, thesis intact. Below +2% trail trigger — hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA -0.8%, faded from intraday high 1649 to 1605. SL 1580 = -2.3% below entry 1618. Q4 turnaround thesis intact. Below trail trigger; hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.3%, just entered. SL 2755 = -1.1% below entry 2785, target 2920. Q4 PAT FY26 +46.7%, refrigerant capex thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB +0.2%, fresh entry. SL 9020 = -0.9% below entry 9100. Q4 record revenue, Rs 47/share dividend, 30-31% market share. Hold to SL or target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "BHARATFORG -1.3%, faded from intraday high 2044 to 1981. Q4 PAT -17% on Labour Codes one-off; SL 1955 = -3% below entry, within budget. Defense order book intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL flat at entry. SL 354 = -2.9% below entry 364.50, within budget. Macquarie OW TP 415, Q4 PAT +30.6%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -0.3%, post Q4 +34% PAT and Rs 12,000 buyback announcement. SL 10440 = -3% below entry 10760. Buyback technical floor supports. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY 16 @ 1226 placed 353min ago, still OPEN. Pharma thesis intact (Wockhardt confirms sector breadth). Let order sit — do not duplicate or cancel."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY 40 @ 487 placed 413min ago, still OPEN. FMCG thesis intact (MARICO confirms). Let limit order sit."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +8.6% lock-in, gap to CMP 2.1% — appropriate trail, do not tighten further (would risk forced exit on noise)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Risk-off hedge, geopolitical premium intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 820 (flat entry) to 825 = locks +0.6%. ATH today, FMCG leader."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +6.6%, gap 1.9% — appropriate, do not chase."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% trigger, defense thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL locks +2.4%, gap 1.6% — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "Within entry-day SL budget, Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Within entry SL budget, turnaround thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, Chemicals leader."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, capital goods leader."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Within SL budget, Q4 PAT decline was Labour Codes one-off."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "Within entry SL budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Within SL budget, buyback floor at 12000 supports."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates not added: (1) THERMAX/NBCC/FINCABLES — Capital Goods cluster already 2 names heavy (POLYCAB + GRSE); cluster discipline (Rule 10) caps further additions today. (2) GABRIEL — Auto Components cluster, BHARATFORG + BAJAJ-AUTO already in book. (3) DABUR — already pending OPEN order. (4) LAURUSLABS — already pending OPEN order. (5) NUVAMA +20.75% — chasing extreme move post-earnings; reject on R:R. (6) TATATECH — agent BEARISH despite volume spike (FY26 PAT -19%, ROE 14.6%, MOFSL Sell TP 500). (7) RAMCOCEM — agent BEARISH (S India price weakness, Q4 pending). (8) PERSISTENT — IT cluster has COFORGE; do not stack a second IT breakout post-earnings. Deployment 61% — within soft target band, not under-deployed; book is well-positioned with 13 names across Financials/FMCG/IT/Defense/Chemicals/Pharma/Auto.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong P&L day (+1.36%, +13,781) driven by post-earnings tailwinds across PNBHOUSING (+10.9%), COFORGE (+8.7%), CAMS (+4.1%), MARICO (+1.6%). 45 min to close — focus is preserving today's gains via the MARICO trail, not new entries. SL trail discipline applied with 1% floor (Rule per trail-gap) — explicitly avoided tightening PNBHOUSING/COFORGE/CAMS further despite winners, since gap to CMP already in healthy 1.6-2.1% band. Cumulative experiment P&L now positive (~+10,621 = +1.06%) versus -1,859 going into today's session — the broad earnings-week book paying off. Tomorrow's focus: re-assess if any winners hit targets early, otherwise let the book run."
}
